PostToolUse.command: filepath="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$filepath" == *.swift ]]; then cd /Volumes/eyedisk/develop/oozoofrog/swiftmcp && swift build 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

PreToolUse.command: content="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_NEW_STRING$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_CONTENT"; if echo "$content" | grep -qE '\bprint\(' && ! echo "$content" | grep -q 'stderr'; then echo 'BLOCK: stdout 오염 주의 — print() 대신 StderrWriter 또는 FileHandle.standardError 사용 필요'; exit 1; fi
